description: Lock smartphone_app_stores to mass-market smartphone app-store platforms, not mobile SDKs or generic software repositories.

checks.reason: The node remains anchored to the 2008 iPhone App Store launch as the mass-market smartphone app-store scope.
Smartphone operating systems and devices are the enabling platform for smartphone app stores.
Payment processing and in-app purchasing are commercial scaling infrastructure, not a hard prerequisite for all app distribution.
Compiler toolchains are upstream app-development context, not direct app-store distribution infrastructure.
